text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Another summer with Super Creek is here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's filled with emotion over realizing how much
I've matured since last year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a bond so strong you could almost call it
familial, we look towards the fall race as our final
summer camp together begins!
